INCIDENTTITLE: Theft attempt at silvassa site at 13 Mar 2023, 12:18 AM
INCIDENTDETAILS: On 13.03.2022 at 0020hrs Security Control Room operator (SCR) noticed a person, Monomark CCPC-Mechanical welder Ravindra Kumar Yadav moving suspiciously CCPC backside near the boundary wall. He threw something outside the boundary wall. SCR operator informed to the Security SIC Harendra Singh. Harendra Singh checked the CCTV footage and immediately went outside the boundary wall, where he found several mounds of material covered in cloth. On opening the cloth mounds, copper samples, anode lugs and loose copper were found in the clothes, and all these were recovered. Afterwards, SIC went inside the CCPC area, where Ravindra was summoned and investigated. Suspect accepted the attempt to commit theft.

INCIDENTTITLE: Trespassing at boundary wall no. 47, behind ACP at silvassa site at 26 Mar 2023, 9:41 PM
INCIDENTDETAILS:
On 26th March at around 21:53hrs, Control room operator noticed a person who jumped out from the boundary wall no 46 and at the same time he informed the SIC. While checking the CCTV footage, we have found that a person came from village at 21:41hrs through a tree which is too close to boundary wall 47 (NEAR ACP) and was trying to open Jumbo bag which was kept near the boundary wall, but he was not able to open those bags. He hid behind those bags for about 10 minutes. After 10-15 Minutes, a helper Mrs. Kusum was roaming there when she saw that person, and raised an alarm to apprehend him but he swiftly ascended the tree and jumped from the wall towards the village area.
 
No material was taken.
